creator: ljb@debian.org
text:
Synopsis:       Noise / Scratchiness in 4.1 SBLive driver
 Priority:       medium
 Category:       kern
 Release:        FreeBSD 4.1-STABLE i386
 Class:          sw-bug
 
 Description: 
     SBlive [emu10k]  driver in 4.1-RELEASE, STABLE, exhibits
     noise / scratchiness during playback [mpg123, xmms].
 
     Behaviour was existent in 4.1-RC kernel versions as well.
 
     First experienced with 5.0-CURRENT a month or so back.
